name: Elixir of the Peaks (Greater)
description:
Activate 1 (manipulate)

With much of New Thassilon located among the rugged heights of the Kodar Mountains, these elixirs have grown in popularity among those frequently travel the region. For 1 day, drinking this elixir while in mountainous terrain protects you from the effects of severe cold and grants you a +3 item bonus to Athletics checks made to Climb, , or , as well as to saving throws against the effects of high altitude. The elixir also protects against extreme cold.
